name: MC Compass
description: Personal dietary reference and symptom diary for lymphocytic colitis recovery.
_shortcuts_note: Shortcuts appear when the user long-presses the app icon on their home screen (Android natively, iOS 13+). They act like deep links — tapping one opens the app directly to that action rather than the home screen. The ?action= URL parameters are read by diary.html on load to auto-open the correct form. A small UX detail that signals PWA expertise in a portfolio context.

shortcuts.name: Log a meal
shortcuts.description: Add a new meal entry to your diary

shortcuts.name: Food guide
shortcuts.description: Check if a food is safe
